name: 20" LED Twinkling Champagne Glitter Starburst Christmas Novelty Sculpture Light Warm White - Wondershop™
description:
Add a brilliant burst of shine to your decor with this LED Champagne Glitter Starburst with Twinkle Christmas Novelty Silhouette Lights with White color Light Bulbs from Wondershop™. This novelty silhouette light is designed in a starburst shape in a champagne glitter hue, wrapped around in a gold-color wire adorned with 140 twinkling white LED bulbs for a dazzling look. Hang it anywhere inside or outside your home wherever you want to infuse a little extra illumination and holiday magic.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
